title: Backend Developer Vacancy at KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies!
